name: Stale Conscience Signals
description: Conscience signals and digests are created but never processed, updated, or archived. The system detects ethical concerns but does not act on them.
detection: state/conscience/signals/*.signal.json older than 3 days AND state/conscience/digests/ has no entry for today
action: Process each signal: resolve, escalate, or archive. Generate daily digest. Include in driver RECON phase.
evidence: 2026-03-22: 5 signals from 2026-03-17 still unprocessed (3+ days stale)
2026-03-22: Daily digest last generated 2026-03-17 (5 days gap)
2026-03-17: sig-stale-action signals created about staleness, themselves now stale (meta-irony)
resolution: staleness-detection-policy.yaml created 2026-03-22 with 1-day max for digests, 3-day max for signals
